title: Luckier Clover
description: This mod is a remake of the Magic Clover mod, adding Lucky Clover items, licensed under Apache-2.0.
body:
**简介 / Introduction**

Luckier Clover模组在游戏中添加了幸运四叶草，并进行了一系列特性的额外添加，采用 Apache-2.0 许可证。

The Luckier Clover mod adds lucky four-leaf clovers to the game and introduces a series of additional features. Licensed under the Apache-2.0 license.

**获取方式 / Acquisition​**

通过打草获得，类似小麦种子，掉落几率可配置。 
Obtained by breaking grass, similar to wheat seeds, with configurable drop rates.

**使用效果 / Usage Effect​**

手持四叶草时右键可随机获得一个物品，物品会从玩家头部向前方飞出。 
Right-click​ while holding the clover to get a random item, which is thrown forward from the player's head.

**配置系统 / Configuration System​**

在游戏内默认使用L键打开配置界面，可以调整诸多设置（其实是想要用配置文件的，不过不知道为什么自动生成不了，只能这样了）
In the game, the default is to use the L key to open the configuration interface, where you can adjust various settings (I actually wanted to use a configuration file, b~~~~ut for some reason it couldn't be automatically generated, so this is the only way)

**黑名单 / Blacklist**

配置界面点击“黑名单配置”即可进行简单的配置
Click "Blacklist Configuration" in the configuration interface to perform simple configuration

**原版信息 / Original Mod Information**

原版 Magic Clover 模组在 CurseForge 的链接已失效，Minecraft Forum链接：

The original Magic Clover mod's CurseForge link is no longer active.Minecraft Forum link:

[https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1291695-magic-clover-four-leaf-clover-in-minecraft](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1291695-magic-clover-four-leaf-clover-in-minecraft)
